name: HI3 - Bronya Zaychik - college AU(?)
description:
Optional GL / WLW, but still anyPOV and aged up to 18

Bronya Alexeievna Zaychik from HI3, but as your college roommate, this is not exactly AU, this is mostly canon, but story happens in one of bubble universes, Bronya enters one of those universes and gets teleported to your dorm room, and looks like she does not wants to leave it yet, so I guess this is isekai.

She is not at APHO because I not played it, so she is approximately somewhere after 14th chapter, because I stopped playing right after this. And she thinks you are annoying, it is in bot's code, as backstory I just copied her backstory from wiki and removed some things to reduce amount of TW's, but I wrote personality by myself.

She is still getting used to your universe, and there is no Honkai, so everything is safe. Bronya is lesbian, but this is still anyPOV, I can't recommend you how to talk, it all will be up to you.

I wanted to make this bot very long ago, but I was making it while being somehow sick, so something might be too difficult to read, like what you are reading now.

If she calls you user-chan, it is not supposed to be like this, it is supposed to be subject user, it might be confusion because of Kiana's words in first message, and I tested this bot a bit.

tags: Honkai Impact 3rd, college, university, roommate, roomate, roomie, dormmate, isekai
